scripts.test:diagram: tsc --pretty false --module esnext --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --outDir .tmp-diagram-tests src/app/diagrams/model.ts src/app/diagrams/file.ts src/app/diagrams/graph.ts src/app/diagrams/file.spec.ts src/app/diagrams/graph.spec.ts src/app/contracts.ts src/app/generated/core-contracts.ts && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-diagram-tests/diagrams/file.spec.js && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-diagram-tests/diagrams/graph.spec.js && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-diagram-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.test:explorer: tsc --pretty false --module esnext --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --outDir .tmp-explorer-tests src/app/explorer/graph.ts src/app/explorer/graph.spec.ts src/app/diagrams/file.ts src/app/contracts.ts src/app/generated/core-contracts.ts && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node .tmp-explorer-tests/explorer/graph.spec.js && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-explorer-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.test:path-utils: tsc --pretty false --module esnext --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --outDir .tmp-path-tests src/app/pathUtils.ts src/app/pathUtils.spec.ts && node .tmp-path-tests/pathUtils.spec.js && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-path-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})"
scripts.test:startup-sequence: tsc --pretty false --module esnext --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --outDir .tmp-startup-tests src/app/startupSequence.ts src/app/startupSequence.spec.ts && node .tmp-startup-tests/startupSequence.spec.js && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp-startup-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})"
